examples: There are three main types of symbiotic relationships: parasitism, commensalism, and mutualism.
Parasitism is a kind of predator-prey relationship in which one organism, the parasite, derives its food at the expense of its symbiotic associate, the host.
The impaired organ, tissue, etc. Of mollusc host caused by parasitism.
People who complain about parasitic banks should understand that parasitism is exactly what a permanent system of size-capped banks would produce.
Parasitism that would have seemed sad anywhere else blossomed into flamboyant celebrity.
